name: codex_rollout_operations_summary
primary_question: What bounded rollout campaign posture is represented by the checked-in trusted owner history without turning stats into current deployment or rollout authority?
derivation_rule: derive bounded historical rollout state counts and the source-owned latest pointer from the exact four checked-in 8Dionysus generated/codex/rollout surfaces
authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned rollout history and rollback windows.
